name: How to Take a Screenshot in Windows 10 | PCMag
snippet: Press Windows Key-Shift-S, and you have a choice of capturing the full screen, a rectangular selection, a freehand selection, or an individual program window.

name: ️ Microsoft Settings You Should Review for Better Privacy (Windows
snippet: Open Settings Click Privacy & Security Scroll down to App Permissions Tap Screenshots & Screen Recordings Turn OFF Let apps take screenshots and ...

name: How to allow or prevent apps from taking screenshots in Windows 10
snippet: Press the Windows key + I to open Settings. Click Privacy. On the left pane, scroll down and click Screenshots and apps. click on Change button.
